title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Single Fitted Sheet 25cm Deep | Charcoal Polycotton Bed Sheet | Soft & Breathable Easy Care Bedding with Elastic Corners | Single Mattress Bottom Sheet - (90 x 190 cm)
features: PRODUCT DIMENSIONS - 1 x Single Fitted Sheet measuring (90 x 190 cm) with a 25 cm (10 inch) depth, designed to perfectly fit a single mattress.
PREMIUM MATERIAL COMPOSITION - Made from a durable 50% Cotton & 50% Polyester blend, this single bed sheets combines softness, comfort, and long-lasting strength.
SECURE ELASTIC CORNERS - The strong elastic all around ensures the fitted sheet single bed stays in place, providing a snug fit and effortless bed-making.
SUPER SOFT & SMOOTH - Crafted with tightly woven, high-density fine yarns for a luxuriously soft, smooth, and breathable finish - premium quality bedding & linen for everyday comfort.
EASY CARE INSTRUCTIONS - Machine washable at 40℃. Wash dark coloured bedsheets separately. Do not bleach. Tumble dry on low to maintain long-lasting freshness of your bedsheets.
